title: Add OIDC auth and react-router foundation
description:
Install and configure:
- oidc-client-ts (or @axa-fr/react-oidc) for Keycloak OIDC
- react-router-dom for client-side routing

Routes:
  / — landing page (already exists as PoC)
  /hub — community hub (protected)
  /join — join community via invite code (protected)
  /profile — identity status page (protected)
  /verify — eID verification flow (protected)
  /callback — OIDC redirect callback handler

Auth guard: redirect to Keycloak login if not authenticated.
On login: redirect to /hub.
close_reason: oidc-client-ts + react-router-dom installed; AuthContext + ProtectedRoute + all 5 routes implemented; stubs for hub/join/profile/verify ready for follow-on issues

title: Join community via invite code
description:
Implement /join page.

UI: single invite code input field + [Join] button.

Calls POST /v2/sharemember/me/communities/join with { inviteCode }.

On success:
- Show confirmation: 'You have joined [community name]!'
- Redirect to /hub (community now appears in the list)

On error (invalid code): show inline error message.

Invite codes are distributed offline (person to person) — no discovery UI needed.

title: Profile page — identity status + avatar
description:
Implement /profile page.

Shows:
- Display name (from Keycloak token)
- Avatar (greyscale + dashed border + ? badge if UN-IDENTIFIED; colour + shield badge if IDENTIFIED)
- Identity status banner:
  UN-IDENTIFIED: 'Your identity is not yet verified. Identify yourself to unlock full participation and protect your shaRe presence from impersonation.' + [Verify with eID] CTA
  IDENTIFIED: shield badge + 'Identity verified' + verified date

Reads eidStatus from Keycloak JWT claim or GET /v2/eid/status.

title: eID verification page — /verify flow
description:
Implement /verify page.

Step-by-step guidance UI explaining what eID is and what the user needs (German Personalausweis + AusweisApp).

Flow:
1. User clicks [Start eID verification]
2. Calls GET /v2/eid/start → receives redirect URL to Verimi/eID server
3. Redirect user to eID server
4. After eID flow, user is redirected back to /verify?status=...
5. On success: POST /v2/eid/callback (or operator-ts handles callback directly)
6. Redirect to /profile — now showing IDENTIFIED status

Error states: user cancelled, eID already used by another account (duplicate).

title: sharemember-app MVP — identity hub + community portal
description:
MVP implementation of the sharemember-app React frontend.

Repo: https://github.com/shaRe-Community/sharemember-app
Spec: ../share-platform/shaRe-eid-integration-spec.md

The app is the front door to the entire shaRe ecosystem:
- Login once at share.community → see all your communities → enter via SSO
- Join a community via invite code
- Manage your IDENTIFIED / UN-IDENTIFIED status
- Trigger eID verification flow

Stack: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite 7 + oidc-client-ts + react-router

title: Community hub page — list + enter communities
description:
Implement /hub page.

Fetches GET /v2/sharemember/me/communities from operator-ts and renders community cards.

Each card shows:
- Community name + intent
- logoUrl (image or placeholder)
- memberCount
- purposeRoundtable name
- [Enter →] button → opens community frontendUrl (direct redirect, SSO via Keycloak)

Empty state: 'You are not a member of any community yet.' + [Join a community] CTA.

UN-IDENTIFIED banner at top if eidStatus === 'un_identified':
  'Your identity is not yet verified. [Verify with eID →]'
